summary: 0.6.53 backs out the broken 0.6.52 discrete-step movie joystick rewrite and restores the original CUA scrub-session behavior from the last safe rung.
operatorSignals: Live `0.6.52` testing showed the attempted discrete-step replacement broke established joystick behavior instead of fixing scrub magnitude.
Trigger plus joystick behavior is an established product seam and must be preserved while debugging scrub movement.
actionsTaken: Compared `0.6.51` and `0.6.52` directly to isolate the exact code-level break in `FASyncRuntime.CuaPlayerInputModule`.
Restored the original movie scrub session fields, begin or end helpers, and analog target accumulation path from the last safe rung.
Stamped a fresh version boundary so the restored behavior can be tested without reusing the broken `0.6.52` authority seam.
nonGoals: No slideshow work in this slice.
No right-stick volume, gaze, or scene-builder changes in this slice.
No new scrub-model redesign in this slice.
